title: 2026-07-13｜Daily English

words.meaning: 激活；用户首次完成关键行为
words.sentence: The new checklist helps users reach activation without leaving the setup flow.

words.meaning: 流失；用户在流程中途退出
words.sentence: A shorter form may reduce checkout drop-off on mobile devices.

words.meaning: 对账；核对不同系统中的记录
words.sentence: The operations team runs payment reconciliation after the daily settlement.

words.meaning: 幂等的；重复执行不会产生额外副作用的
words.sentence: The payment endpoint should be idempotent so repeated requests do not create duplicate orders.

words.meaning: 记忆化；缓存函数计算结果以避免重复计算
words.sentence: We can use memoization to avoid recalculating the filtered list on every render.

words.meaning: 视口；浏览器中当前可见的页面区域
words.sentence: The sticky toolbar should remain visible within the mobile viewport.

words.meaning: 升级处理；将问题提交给更合适或更高层级的人
words.sentence: Please escalate the issue if it blocks the release or affects user data.

words.meaning: 暂定的；尚未最终确认的
words.sentence: This is a tentative timeline and may change after the technical review.

words.meaning: 海关；入境时的申报和检查环节
words.sentence: Allow enough time to clear customs before taking the connecting train.

words.meaning: 中途停留；较长时间的转机停留
words.sentence: An overnight stopover can make a long journey less exhausting.

focus: 动态复习：retention / fulfillment / prerequisite 继续作为业务弱项，与今天的 activation / drop-off / reconciliation 组成“进入流程—中途流失—完成与核对”的表达链路。
技术强化：stale / debounce / hydration 仍需间隔复习；今天重点区分 throttle、race condition、retry，并加入 idempotent / memoization / viewport 描述接口安全、渲染性能和移动端布局。
沟通练习：用 prioritize / consensus 回顾决策过程，再用 escalate / tentative 表达问题升级和尚未确认的计划。
旅行复习：继续巩固 departure / connection，并用 clear customs / overnight stopover 练习入境和长途转机安排。
